name: Better-Than-Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rice in water with salt according to package directions.
2. Allow the cooked rice to cool completely.
3. In a separate bowl, mix mayonnaise, finely chopped onions, prepared mustard, and 2 teaspoons of salt until well combined.
4. Gradually stir the mayo mixture into the cooled rice.
5. Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.
6. Just before serving, stir in diced cucumber and sliced radishes.
